release_notes: 8.3 short path workaround for the Chromium sandbox ACL check. 0.3.73 caught chrome's stub FATAL DCHECK at sandbox_win.cc:789/576 on the Cyrillic chrome.exe path, before --no-sandbox could be parsed. Probe now resolves chromeBin and the temp user-data-dir to short forms (C:\Users\DOKTOR~1\…) via cmd's `for %I in (...) do @echo %~sI`, so the sandbox's GetSecurityDescriptor call gets a pure-ASCII string. Purely additive — if 8.3 names are disabled on the volume the helper returns the original path.
